title: Realistic Needs (Thirst)
description: Adds a realistic thirst system, a new hydration bar, and giant water bottles to your survival experience.
body:
**Realistic Needs** adds a simple thirst mechanic to Minecraft. You now need to manage your hydration alongside your hunger.

![Waterbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6288996e751f14df49b8554686cc79e63f9fc06e.gif)

## Features:
- **Thirst Meter**: Adds a water bar right above your hunger bar.
- **Dehydration**: Hitting zero thirst will deal continuous damage until you drink.
- **Thirst Effect**: A custom negative status effect that drains your hydration much faster.

## Items & Mechanics:
- **Giant Bottle**: A new container used to store larger amounts of water.
- **Giant Water Bottle**: Can be filled at any water source and has **8 uses** before turning back into an empty bottle.
- **Hand Drinking**: If you don't have a bottle, you can drink directly from any water source with an empty hand.

![Giant Waterbottle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf046d707929e5ac98e28616e086b7f5c3b5cd09.gif)
